title: cynoglossum dioscoridis var. castrilense
intro: Cynoglossum dioscoridis var. castrilense, also known as the 'Castril tonguewort', is a plant species belonging to the borage family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and easing respiratory issues, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Cynoglossum dioscoridis var. castrilense is often used as an infusion or tincture, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
